basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Deoghar (AIIMS Deoghar)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Deoghar (AIIMS Deoghar) has published the Nurse Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Nurse position on a contractual basis. Candidates up to 40 years of age holding ANM, GNM, or B.Sc. Nursing qualifications are eligible to attend the walkin interview on 29 July 2026. Candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and walkin interview details below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: None

_labels.notification_pdf: Download AIIMS Deoghar Nurse Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Deoghar Nurse Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Deoghar Nurse Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Deoghar Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download AIIMS Deoghar Nurse Job 2026 Notification PDF

AIIMS Deoghar Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Deoghar Nurse Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Deoghar Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Nurse post at AIIMS Deoghar?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Nurse post at AIIMS Deoghar is scheduled for 29th July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Nurse position?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Nurse position is ANM. Candidates with GNM or BSc Nursing are also preferred. Please refer to the official notification for detailed information.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Nurse post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Nurse post is 40 years. There is no age relaxation mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Nurse position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Nurse position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 16,500.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this AIIMS Deoghar recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this Nurse position?
faq.answer: The job type for this Nurse position is Contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Deoghar located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Deoghar is located in Deoghar, Jharkhand, with the pincode 814117.

faq.question: Q10. How many vacancies are available for the Nurse post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Nurse post at AIIMS Deoghar.
